name: The Nursing
short_description: On your first day working as a caregiver in one of the most remote infirmaries in the region, you are assigned the night shift, the only one available. Little do you know, some things here are not what they seem.
detailed_description:
Description 

"On your first day working as a caregiver in one of the most remote infirmaries in the region, you are assigned the night shift, the only one available. Little do you know, some things here are not what they seem."



About the Game

You will be playing as a new caregiver who has just arrived in town, experiencing her first night in an old remote infirmary, and the darkness feels alive, watching, waiting. Little do you know, this will become a matter of life and death.


Step into the role of a young caregiver newly arrived in town.
What should be a routine overnight shift quickly turns into a struggle for survival as the infirmary reveals its secrets.
Experience a tense, story-driven night where every creak and shadow could be your last.

  • Atmospheric Horror – Explore a lonely, decaying infirmary where silence is rarely safe.

  • Short but Unforgettable – A compact narrative experience that can be completed in under an hour.

  • Simple Controls – Easy to learn so you can focus on the fear.



Controls (Default)

  • Mouse – Look around

  • WASD – Move

  • E – Interaction

  • ESC – Pause Menu

_______________________________________________________________________________

A short, atmospheric horror story.
Developed by Kinggi.
Face the night. Discover what waits in the dark.
